contentList.content: Three target creatures in the area gain [1] and have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on Wisdom <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. If hit by an attack, an affected creature has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on its next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> during combat.
Evoke a heavenly flare and possibly <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDING_SMITE_BLINDED">Blind</LSTag> your target for [1] turns.

Healing energy radiates from you in an aura with a [1] radius. Until the spell ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you.

You can use Restore Vitality to cause one creature in the aura (including you) to regain [2].
Close enough to a friendly caster to be healed with <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_AuraOfVitality_Activate">Restore Vitality</LSTag>.
Use a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">bonus action</LSTag> to heal yourself or a nearby ally.
Must be near a <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="AURA_OF_VITALITY">Aura of Vitality</LSTag>.
